# KahitSan

> Affordable coworking space in Naga City, Philippines. Built for students, professionals, and anyone who needs a reliable place to focus.

KahitSan is a tech-driven coworking space offering flexible hourly rates, memberships, and private spaces with 24/7 access, high-speed internet, and unlimited coffee.

## Location

- Panganiban Drive, Naga City, Philippines (currently open)

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.kahitsan.com/): Overview of KahitSan coworking space, features, and community
- [Solutions & Pricing](https://www.kahitsan.com/solutions): Flexible coworking plans — hourly rates, memberships, private spaces
- [Community](https://www.kahitsan.com/community): Partnerships, sponsorships, and community involvement
- [Announcements](https://www.kahitsan.com/announcements): Latest news and updates
- [About](https://www.kahitsan.com/about): Mission, vision, and story behind KahitSan
- [Contact](https://www.kahitsan.com/contact): Get in touch with KahitSan
- [Terms of Service](https://www.kahitsan.com/terms): Terms and conditions
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.kahitsan.com/privacy): Privacy policy
